Charlie's Eyeworms: Day 11 - It (1990)
prompt in alt

images.alt: First-person POV selfie, crouching low inside a dark, damp concrete sewer tunnel. Water drips down the moss-covered walls. I am wearing a bright, baggy clown suit with silver pom-poms running down the front and large, floppy ruffs around the neck and wrists. My face is painted white with exaggerated red lips and a sharp red triangle painted on each cheek, topped with a tuft of bright orange hair. I am holding a small, red balloon in one hand, floating just above the grimy water. My expression is wide, manic, and predatory, staring intensely at the camera. The lighting is dim and shadowy, with a single beam of sunlight filtering through a street grate above, illuminating the floating dust.

#CharlieEyeworms 
Charlie's Eyeworms: Day 10 - Evil Dead (1981)
prompt in alt

images.alt: First-person POV selfie, standing in the open doorway of a rustic wooden cabin at night. Outside, the forest is pitch black, illuminated only by the warm light spilling out from behind me. I am covered head-to-toe in thick, viscous blood, my hair matted with it, dripping down my face and onto my clothes. I am holding a 'boomstick' shotgun loosely in one hand, resting it against my shoulder. My expression is a mix of exhaustion and manic determination, staring directly at the camera. In the blurred background inside the cabin, chains and hooks can be seen hanging from the rafters. The lighting is high-contrast, highlighting the wet texture of the blood against the darkness.

Jynx Earworms: Day 27 -  "Faith" by George Michael

prompt in alt

images.alt: The setting is a classic 1950s American diner with checkered floors and red vinyl booths, bathed in the warm glow of neon signs. I am leaning casually against a glossy Wurlitzer jukebox, wearing a tight, black leather motorcycle jacket with studs on the lapels over a plain white tee. I have on fitted blue jeans with a turn-up at the hem and heavy black engineer boots. My black and white hair is styled in a slicked-back pompadour. I’m playing with a gold coin between my fingers, looking down at the camera with a smoldering, confident smirk, dark eyeliner framing my eyes. The vibe is timeless, rock-and-roll, and undeniably sexy—channeling that signature "Faith" aesthetic but with a modern twist.

It delights me to no end that tech bros have more money than God but the things they actually want, friends, respect, a good sense of humor and now taste, cannot be bought. AI is the polar opposite of honed style and artisanal sensibility.

record.text: Chicago made it so every public school student can use their school ID as a #LibraryCard 📚. No forms, no extra steps. It gives over 300k students instant access to #books, #tutoring, and online resources 🙌

record.text: My god. Taking credit for victories that are 100% Trump backlash and canned talking points.

AI art needs human artists, but what is art?
When does the AI surpass the artist?
& human artists fear generative AI art stealing their styles, because it cannot learn any other way, but what if it could?
If AI art is so bad, why not make it better?

#AI #AIArt #AILearning #AISlop #GenerativeAI

Generative AI art should be better than what it is, to grow as humans do, learn as humans do.

Imagine those high speed art videos, but you can pause & make edits to it on the left side of the screen.
Running on art books & lessons, learning & upgrading.

#AI #AIArt #AILearning #AISlop #GenerativeAI

#AiArtCommunity #digitalart #AiArt #aidigitalart #helvetica #motion #fragments #remixratpack #surrealart #design #AiCommunity #AiArtChallenge #SynthArt #CreativeAi #Ai #AiArtwork #qp prompt in ALT

images.alt: A hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman fused with the structural essence of Helvetica, captured mid-disintegration; her face and upper body fragment into floating shards of skin, glass, torn paper, and bold black sans-serif letterforms, as if her anatomy is breaking apart into typographic components; clean geometric glyphs (H, e, t, a) emerge from within her structure, some embedded beneath translucent skin, others drifting outward in zero-gravity; ultra-detailed skin texture with pores, subtle imperfections, and natural sheen; cinematic lighting with strong directional key light and soft shadow falloff, slight anamorphic lens distortion and chromatic aberration on fragment edges; shallow depth of field with soft bokeh background, blurred modernist environment suggesting Swiss design architecture; wind sweeping through, pushing hair and fragments in one direction, freezing motion mid-air with fine dust and ink particles suspended; mix of materials—matte ink, glossy surfaces, paper fibers, and realistic skin—creating tactile contrast; monochrome palette of black, white, and warm neutral tones; emotionally restrained expression with a hint of tension; ultra-polished, Vogue-level editorial, 85mm lens, f/1.8, portrait orientation, 8K detail.

A hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a woman fused with the structural essence of Helvetica, captured mid-disintegration; her face and upper body fragment into floating shards of skin, glass, torn paper, and bold black sans-serif letterforms, as if her anatomy is breaking apart into typographic components; clean geometric glyphs (H, e, t, a) emerge from within her structure, some embedded beneath translucent skin, others drifting outward in zero-gravity; ultra-detailed skin texture with pores, subtle imperfections, and natural sheen; cinematic lighting with strong directional key light and soft shadow falloff, slight anamorphic lens distortion and chromatic aberration on fragment edges; shallow depth of field with soft bokeh background, blurred modernist environment suggesting Swiss design architecture; wind sweeping through, pushing hair and fragments in one direction, freezing motion mid-air with fine dust and ink particles suspended; mix of materials—matte ink, glossy surfaces, paper fibers, and realistic skin—creating tactile contrast; monochrome palette of black, white, and warm neutral tones; emotionally restrained expression with a hint of tension; ultra-polished, Vogue-level editorial, 85mm lens, f/1.8, portrait orientation, 8K detail.

record.text: 'A UK team has used bacteria to generate the hydrogen gas that is needed to produce drugs, fuels, preserved foods and plastics.....The team then turned waste bread into a food source that could be given to the bacteria instead of glucose, to show that this type of food waste can be repurposed.' 1/2

images.alt: Anime-style fox-eared woman standing on a futuristic rooftop balcony at sunset. She wears an orange jacket, white fitted outfit, black tactical belts, gloves, and thigh-high stockings with heeled boots. Her long blonde hair flows behind her, and a large fox tail curves downward. She stands in a confident, slightly angled pose, weight on one leg. The scene is lit by warm golden light from a low sun near the horizon, casting long shadows across clean tiled flooring. Around her are industrial elements—metal railings, stacked crates with warning markings, and a nearby wall panel with a wolf emblem and “ALPHA UNIT 07” text. In the background, a distant city skyline stretches beneath a soft orange-pink sky with scattered clouds.

images.alt:
A stylized anime fox-woman stands on a futuristic rooftop at sunset, turned slightly away while looking back over her shoulder with a confident, playful smirk. She has long, flowing orange hair, fox ears, and amber eyes. Her large, tapered fox tail is now cleanly attached at the base of her spine, emerging naturally from behind her hips and curving downward with a soft, controlled arc, ending in a pale tip.

She wears a fitted orange jacket over black tactical gear, including belts, gloves, and thigh-high boots. Her posture is balanced and grounded, with one leg slightly forward, casting a soft shadow on the smooth rooftop surface.

The environment is a clean, cel-shaded anime-style industrial rooftop with simplified details—metal railings, crates, and a nearby structure marked “ALPHA UNIT 07” with a wolf emblem. In the distance, a stylized city skyline and a tall communications tower sit beneath a warm orange sky with soft clouds, all rendered with reduced texture and consistent linework to match her illustration style.

Title: Digital Synesthesia: The Architecture of Thought
Style: Digital generative art / Cyberpunk abstraction / Algorithmic art with glitch aesthetics
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A digital generative art piece featuring an immersive algorithmic landscape where fractal patterns in electric cyan and magenta pulse rhythmically across an infinite dark void. Complex geometric neural networks weave through translucent layers, creating overlapping planes of mathematical beauty that suggest consciousness rendered as pure luminous data streams. The composition unfolds from a central focal point with radiating crystalline structures and glitch-distorted elements that spiral outward into the cosmic digital space. Bioluminescent forms self-illuminate with intense neon glows and cool blue undertones, contrasting dramatically against the deep black background to create a transcendental cyberpunk vision of sentient technology.

value.text:
#aiart #promptshare
Title: "A Portrait of Warmth"
Style: Lifestyle/Portrait Photography with a modern, approachable aesthetic
Prompt in ALT

images.alt: A portrait photograph of a young woman with warm-toned skin and luxurious blonde curly hair that cascades in defined spirals over her shoulders. She gazes directly at the camera with almond-shaped deep brown eyes framed by voluminous dark lashes, her full lips enhanced with matte red lipstick, while her right hand delicately touches the curls near her temple in a graceful pose. She wears a simple black V-neck top and a thin gold chain necklace with a small heart-shaped red gemstone pendant that catches the light. The background features a cozy indoor setting with soft warm lighting from a glowing lamp on the left and a partially visible framed artwork on a beige wall, all rendered with a shallow depth of field that creates an intimate, homey atmosphere.

record.text:
#毎日ふたなり 5/2 ファンタジーものです、エルフ魔法使いとふたなりアマゾネスのパーティ
エルフさんはエルフの里で育って潔癖でエルフ以外の種族も下品な生き物として見下していましたが、ふたなりアマゾネスさんのあまりの”性”に圧倒され、今では毎晩宿屋でパコパコするエロエルフになってしまいました😊
#AIart #Futanari
